title: Expanded Melons
body:
+ What dose this mod add -

Adds varients of melons you can make with the stone cutter and brewing stand allowing for a more varietied list of melons 

+ Why our mod? -

Monthly updates, discord community and other additions such as voted in features and collabs

+ Other things before you download -

(if any of these recipes confuse you use JEI to see how to craft the suppliments from this mod)
